title_zh: 英伟达推理软件堆栈如何实现最低令牌成本
title_en: How NVIDIA’s Inference Software Stack Powers the Lowest Token Cost
summary_zh: 随着企业从AI试点转向大规模AI生产，基础设施决策从峰值芯片规格转变为每令牌成本——即每美元、每瓦特及满足延迟要求下可提供的有效令牌数量。英伟达的推理软件堆栈与其GPU、CPU、网络及系统协同设计，并得益于广泛的开源生态系统，助力实现最低令牌成本。
summary_en: As organizations transition from AI pilots to large-scale AI production, infrastructure decisions have shifted from peak chip specs to cost per token—the number of useful tokens deliverable per dollar, per watt, and within latency targets. NVIDIA’s inference software stack, codesigned with its GPUs, CPUs, networking, and systems and supported by a broad open source ecosystem, enables the lowest token cost.
why_it_matters_zh: 这一转变反映了实际应用中对成本与性能平衡的重视，英伟达的软件与硬件协同优化正是满足此需求的关键。
why_it_matters_en: This shift highlights the importance of balancing cost and performance in real-world AI applications, and NVIDIA’s co-optimized software and hardware stack is key to meeting this need.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: How NVIDIA’s Inference Software Stack Powers the Lowest Token Cost. Category: coding_ai. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.
ranking_reason: Selected from authoritative primary source; quality score 73.
